17: // Language:       SystemVerilog                                                   //
18: //                                                                                 //
19: // Description:    This component implements a wrapper for a configurable APB node //
20: //                                                                                 //
21: // =============================================================================== //
22: 
23: module apb_node_wrap
24:   #(
25:     parameter NB_MASTER = 8,
26:     parameter APB_DATA_WIDTH = 32,
27:     parameter APB_ADDR_WIDTH = 32
28:     )
29:    (
30:     input logic                                      clk_i,
31:     input logic                                      rst_ni,
32: 
33:     // SLAVE PORT
34:     APB_BUS.Slave                                    apb_slave,
35: 
36:     // MASTER PORTS
37:     APB_BUS.Master                                   apb_masters[NB_MASTER-1:0],
38: 
39:     // CONFIGURATION PORT
40:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] start_addr_i,
41:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] end_addr_i
42:     );
43: 
44:    genvar                              i;
45: 
46:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               penable;
47:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               pwrite;
48:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]         paddr;
49:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               psel;
50:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]         pwdata;
51:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]         prdata;
52:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               pready;
53:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               pslverr;
54: 
55:    // GENERATE SEL SIGNAL FOR MASTER MATCHING THE ADDRESS
56:    generate
57:       for(i=0;i<NB_MASTER;i++)
58:         begin
59:            assign apb_masters[i].penable = penable[i];
60:            assign apb_masters[i].pwrite  = pwrite[i];
61:            assign apb_masters[i].paddr   = paddr[i];
62:            assign apb_masters[i].psel    = psel[i];
63:            assign apb_masters[i].pwdata  = pwdata[i];
64:            assign prdata[i]              = apb_masters[i].prdata;
65:            assign pready[i]              = apb_masters[i].pready;
66:            assign pslverr[i]             = apb_masters[i].pslverr;
67:         end
68:    endgenerate
69: 
70:    apb_node
71:      #(
72:        .NB_MASTER(NB_MASTER),
73:        .APB_DATA_WIDTH(APB_DATA_WIDTH),
74:        .APB_ADDR_WIDTH(APB_ADDR_WIDTH)
75:        )
76:    apb_node_i
77:      (
78: 
79:       .penable_i(apb_slave.penable),
80:       .pwrite_i(apb_slave.pwrite),
81:       .paddr_i(apb_slave.paddr),
82:       .pwdata_i(apb_slave.pwdata),
83:       .prdata_o(apb_slave.prdata),
84:       .pready_o(apb_slave.pready),
85:       .pslverr_o(apb_slave.pslverr),
86: 
87:       .penable_o(penable),
88:       .pwrite_o(pwrite),
89:       .paddr_o(paddr),
90:       .psel_o(psel),
91:       .pwdata_o(pwdata),
92:       .prdata_i(prdata),
93:       .pready_i(pready),
94:       .pslverr_i(pslverr),
95: 
96:       .START_ADDR_i(start_addr_i),

56: `define REG_CLUSTER_BOOT_ADDR0 7'b0100000
57: `define REG_CLUSTER_BOOT_ADDR1 7'b0100001
58: // NOTE: safe regs will be mapped starting from BASEADDR+0x100
59: 
60: //`define MSG_VERBOSE
61: 
62: module apb_soc_ctrl
63:   #(
64:     parameter APB_ADDR_WIDTH = 12,  // APB slaves are 4KB by default
65:     parameter NB_CLUSTERS    = 0,   // N_CLUSTERS
66:     parameter NB_CORES       = 4,   // N_CORES
67:     parameter JTAG_REG_SIZE  = 8
68:     )
69:    (
70:     input  logic                      HCLK,
71:     input  logic                      HRESETn,
72:     input  logic [APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] PADDR,
73:     input  logic               [31:0] PWDATA,
74:     input  logic                      PWRITE,
75:     input  logic                      PSEL,
76:     input  logic                      PENABLE,
77:     output logic               [31:0] PRDATA,
78:     output logic                      PREADY,
79:     output logic                      PSLVERR,
80: 
81:     input  logic                      sel_fll_clk_i,
82: 
83:     output logic         [63:0] [5:0] pad_cfg,
84:     output logic         [63:0] [1:0] pad_mux,
85: 
86:     input  logic                [JTAG_REG_SIZE-1:0] soc_jtag_reg_i,
87:     output logic                [JTAG_REG_SIZE-1:0] soc_jtag_reg_o,
88: 
89:     output logic               [31:0] fc_bootaddr_o,
90: 
91:     output logic                      fc_fetchen_o,
92:     output logic                      sel_hyper_axi_o,
93:     output logic                      cluster_pow_o, // power cluster
94:     output logic                      cluster_byp_o, // bypass cluster
95:     output logic               [63:0] cluster_boot_addr_o,
96:     output logic                      cluster_fetch_enable_o,
97:     output logic                      cluster_rstn_o,
98:     output logic                      cluster_irq_o
99:     );
100: 
101:    logic     [31:0] r_pwr_reg;
102:    logic     [31:0] r_corestatus;
103: 
104: 
105:    logic      [6:0] s_apb_addr;
106: 
107:    logic     [15:0] n_cores;
108:    logic     [15:0] n_clusters;
109: 
110:    logic     [63:0] r_pad_fun0;
111:    logic     [63:0] r_pad_fun1;
112: 
113:    logic     [63:0] r_cluster_boot;
114:    logic            r_cluster_fetch_enable;
115:    logic            r_cluster_rstn;
116: 
117:    logic      [JTAG_REG_SIZE-1:0] r_jtag_rego;
118:    logic      [JTAG_REG_SIZE-1:0] r_jtag_regi_sync[1:0];
119: 
120:    logic            r_cluster_byp;
121:    logic            r_cluster_pow;
122:    logic     [31:0] r_bootaddr;
123:    logic            r_fetchen;
124: 
125:    logic            r_cluster_irq;
126: 
127:    logic            r_sel_hyper_axi;
128: 
129:    logic s_apb_write;
130: 
131:    assign soc_jtag_reg_o = r_jtag_rego;
132: 
133:    assign fc_bootaddr_o = r_bootaddr;
134:    assign fc_fetchen_o  = r_fetchen;
135:

90:     assign s_start_addr[9] = `STDOUT_START_ADDR;
91:     assign s_end_addr[9]   = `STDOUT_END_ADDR;
92: 
93:     `APB_ASSIGN_MASTER(s_masters[10], mmap_debug_master);
94:     assign s_start_addr[10] = `DEBUG_START_ADDR;
95:     assign s_end_addr[10]   = `DEBUG_END_ADDR;
96: 
97: 
98:     //********************************************************
99:     //**************** SOC BUS *******************************
100:     //********************************************************
101:     apb_node_wrap #(
102:         .NB_MASTER      ( NB_MASTER      ),
103:         .APB_ADDR_WIDTH ( APB_ADDR_WIDTH ),
104:         .APB_DATA_WIDTH ( APB_DATA_WIDTH )
105:     ) apb_node_wrap_i (
106:         .clk_i        ( clk_i        ),

525:         .cluster_byp_o            ( cluster_byp_o          ),
526:         .cluster_boot_addr_o      ( cluster_boot_addr_o    ),
527:         .cluster_fetch_enable_o   ( cluster_fetch_enable_o ),
528:         .cluster_rstn_o           ( cluster_rstn_o         ),
529:         .cluster_irq_o            ( cluster_irq_o          )
530:     );
531: 
532:     apb_adv_timer #(
533:         .APB_ADDR_WIDTH ( APB_ADDR_WIDTH ),
534:         .EXTSIG_NUM     ( 32             )
535:     ) apb_adv_timer_i (
536:         .HCLK            ( clk_i                   ),
537:         .HRESETn         ( rst_ni                  ),
538: 
539:         .dft_cg_enable_i ( dft_cg_enable_i         ),
540: 
541:         .PADDR           ( s_adv_timer_bus.paddr   ),

598:         .cl_event_data_o  ( cl_event_data_o            ),
599:         .cl_event_ready_i ( cl_event_ready_i           ),
600:         .pr_event_valid_o ( s_pr_event_valid           ),
601:         .pr_event_data_o  ( s_pr_event_data            ),
602:         .pr_event_ready_i ( s_pr_event_ready           )
603:     );
604: 
605: 
606:     apb_timer_unit #(.APB_ADDR_WIDTH(APB_ADDR_WIDTH)) i_apb_timer_unit (
607:         .HCLK       ( clk_i                   ),
608:         .HRESETn    ( rst_ni                  ),
609:         .PADDR      ( s_apb_timer_bus.paddr   ),
610:         .PWDATA     ( s_apb_timer_bus.pwdata  ),
611:         .PWRITE     ( s_apb_timer_bus.pwrite  ),
612:         .PSEL       ( s_apb_timer_bus.psel    ),
613:         .PENABLE    ( s_apb_timer_bus.penable ),
614:         .PRDATA     ( s_apb_timer_bus.prdata  ),

11: module udma_subsystem
12: #(
13:     parameter UDMA_EVENTS   = 28,
14:     parameter L2_ADDR_WIDTH = 15,
15:     parameter L2_DATA_WIDTH = 32,
16:     parameter CAM_DATA_WIDTH = 8,
17:     parameter APB_ADDR_WIDTH = 12,  //APB slaves are 4KB by default
18:     parameter TRANS_SIZE     = 17
19: )
20: (
21:     output logic                       L2_ro_wen_o    ,
22:     output logic                       L2_ro_req_o    ,
23:     input  logic                       L2_ro_gnt_i    ,
24:     output logic                [31:0] L2_ro_addr_o   ,
25:     output logic [L2_DATA_WIDTH/8-1:0] L2_ro_be_o     ,
26:     output logic   [L2_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] L2_ro_wdata_o  ,
27:     input  logic                       L2_ro_rvalid_i ,
28:     input  logic   [L2_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] L2_ro_rdata_i  ,
29: 
30:     output logic                       L2_wo_wen_o    ,
31:     output logic                       L2_wo_req_o    ,
32:     input  logic                       L2_wo_gnt_i    ,
33:     output logic                [31:0] L2_wo_addr_o   ,
34:     output logic   [L2_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] L2_wo_wdata_o  ,
35:     output logic [L2_DATA_WIDTH/8-1:0] L2_wo_be_o     ,
36:     input  logic                       L2_wo_rvalid_i ,
37:     input  logic   [L2_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] L2_wo_rdata_i  ,
38: 
39:     input  logic                       dft_test_mode_i,
40:     input  logic                       dft_cg_enable_i,
41: 
42:     input  logic                       sys_clk_i,
43:     input  logic                       periph_clk_i,
44:     input  logic                       HRESETn,
45:     input  logic  [APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] PADDR,
46:     input  logic                [31:0] PWDATA,
47:     input  logic                       PWRITE,
48:     input  logic                       PSEL,
49:     input  logic                       PENABLE,
50:     output logic                [31:0] PRDATA,
51:     output logic                       PREADY,
52:     output logic                       PSLVERR,
53: 
54:     output logic     [UDMA_EVENTS-1:0] events_o,
55: 
56:     input  logic                      event_valid_i,
57:     input  logic                [7:0] event_data_i,
58:     output logic                      event_ready_o,
59: 
60:     output logic                       spi0_clk,
61:     output logic                       spi0_csn0,
62:     output logic                       spi0_csn1,
63:     output logic                       spi0_csn2,
64:     output logic                       spi0_csn3,
65:     output logic                 [1:0] spi0_mode,
66:     output logic                       spi0_sdo0,
67:     output logic                       spi0_sdo1,
68:     output logic                       spi0_sdo2,
69:     output logic                       spi0_sdo3,
70:     input  logic                       spi0_sdi0,
71:     input  logic                       spi0_sdi1,
72:     input  logic                       spi0_sdi2,
73:     input  logic                       spi0_sdi3,
74: 
75:     input  logic                       cam_clk_i,
76:     input  logic  [CAM_DATA_WIDTH-1:0] cam_data_i,
77:     input  logic                       cam_hsync_i,
78:     input  logic                       cam_vsync_i,
79: 
80:     input  logic                       uart_rx,
81:     output logic                       uart_tx,
82: 
83:     input  logic                       i2s_sd0_i,
84:     input  logic                       i2s_sd1_i,
